original_query: select   i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  ,sum(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit  ,sum(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss  ,sum(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit  from  store_sales  ,store_returns  ,catalog_sales  ,date_dim d1  ,date_dim d2  ,date_dim d3  ,store  ,item  where  d1.d_moy = 8  and d1.d_year = 2001  and d1.d_date_sk = ss_sold_date_sk  and i_item_sk = ss_item_sk  and s_store_sk = ss_store_sk  and ss_customer_sk = sr_customer_sk  and ss_item_sk = sr_item_sk  and ss_ticket_number = sr_ticket_number  and sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk  and d2.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d2.d_year              = 2001  and sr_customer_sk = cs_bill_customer_sk  and sr_item_sk = cs_item_sk  and cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk  and d3.d_moy               between 8 and  8 + 2  and d3.d_year              = 2001  group by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  order by  i_item_id  ,i_item_desc  ,s_store_id  ,s_store_name  limit 100;
rewritten_query:
select
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name,
    sum(ss_net_profit) as store_sales_profit,
    sum(sr_net_loss) as store_returns_loss,
    sum(cs_net_profit) as catalog_sales_profit
from store_sales
join date_dim d1 on d1.d_date_sk = store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk
    and d1.d_moy = 8
    and d1.d_year = 2001
join store on store.s_store_sk = store_sales.ss_store_sk
join item on item.i_item_sk = store_sales.ss_item_sk
join store_returns on store_sales.ss_customer_sk = store_returns.sr_customer_sk
    and store_sales.ss_item_sk = store_returns.sr_item_sk
    and store_sales.ss_ticket_number = store_returns.sr_ticket_number
join date_dim d2 on store_returns.sr_returned_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk
    and d2.d_moy between 8 and 10
    and d2.d_year = 2001
join catalog_sales on store_returns.sr_customer_sk = catalog_sales.cs_bill_customer_sk
    and store_returns.sr_item_sk = catalog_sales.cs_item_sk
join date_dim d3 on catalog_sales.cs_sold_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk
    and d3.d_moy between 8 and 10
    and d3.d_year = 2001
group by
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name
order by
    i_item_id,
    i_item_desc,
    s_store_id,
    s_store_name
limit 100;

rewrite_suggestion.produced_suggestion: Changed implicit joins to explicit JOIN syntax for better readability and optimizer understanding
Reordered joins to start with store_sales filtered by date_dim d1 first to reduce rows early
Simplified the BETWEEN conditions for d2 and d3 from '8 and 8 + 2' to '8 and 10' for clarity
